mapper.select:
select * from news_notice
and (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
order by sort desc, id desc
select * from news_notice where status = 1 order by sort desc, id desc limit 8
mapper.insert: insert into news_notice(title, content, status, sort, admin_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{adminId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
